message:
feat: redistribute war stories content to Architecture and Built in 5 Days

- Architecture page: added Efficiency Gains (optimization cards) and
  Quality Guards (SLA table) sections, using same motion patterns as
  existing algorithm/decision card grids
- Built in 5 Days page: added Battle Scars section with 4 bug fix
  war stories, using same card pattern as devSessionInsights

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
